milestone: R17 Agentic Operating Surface, A2A Runtime, and Kanban Release Cycle
ui_boundary_label: read-only local/static workforce summary; identity/registry only

agents.purpose: Final authority for meaningful direction, closure, release, promotion, and acceptance decisions.
Administers the local workflow surface, submits intake, and approves operational direction without executing runtime agents.
Coordinates and routes future packets but does not implement, test, approve evidence sufficiency, or bypass gates.
Owns planning, routing, task packet readiness, and acceptance criteria without implementing or testing.
Owns design and technical direction, but does not implement unless a future packet explicitly assigns implementation.
May implement only inside a future execution packet and must not approve evidence sufficiency.
May test and validate only against acceptance criteria and must not implement.
Reviews evidence sufficiency and rejected claims only, and must not implement or rewrite evidence.
Classifies and updates knowledge and memory references while avoiding product execution.
Packages release posture and validation manifests while preserving failed gates and user approval requirements.

approval_authority_summary.meaningful_direction: user; operator can approve operational direction only

handoff_permissions_summary: future packet handoff preparation only; executable handoffs and executable transitions are false for all agents
memory_scope_summary: exact repo refs only; broad repo scan and raw chat history are not canonical memory
